settings.heading: Contact World of Comfort
settings.description: Book a free consultation — in our showroom or at your home. We come to you with expert advice, body analysis, and product demonstrations.

settings.quote: "From the initial body scan to delivery, the experience was impeccable. My sleep has never been better."
settings.author: Mette H.

settings.quote: "They came to our home, measured everything, and built a bed that is truly ours. Exceptional service."
settings.author: Lars & Pia K.

settings.quote: "The massage chair consultation was eye-opening. No pressure, just honest advice. We love our Cosmos X."
settings.author: Thomas B.
